zh.lifeSummary: 當Clémence de Fougères於1170年出生時，她的父親Guillaume de Fougères21歲，母親Agatha du Hommet19歲。她於大約1190年與Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1252年享年82歲。

zh-hans.Wallingford, Berkshire, England: 英国英格兰波克夏瓦林福德
zh-hans.Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France: 法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clémence de Fougères于1170年出生时，她的父亲Guillaume de Fougères21岁，母亲Agatha du Hommet19岁。她于大约1190年与Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1252年享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fougères
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Alcide, Armand, Emile, Fleurette, Thierry.

French (Fougère): topographic name for someone who lived in a place densely grown with ferns, from Old French foug(i)ere ‘fern, bracken’ (from Late Latin filicaria); or a habitational name from (La) Fougère, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Fugere .

History: Jean Fougère from Poupry in Eure-et-Loir, France, married first Marie Bourg in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada) in 1713, and second Marie-Madeleine Belliveau in Port-Toulouse (St. Peters), NS, Canada, c. 1728.

variants.name: Fugere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Celine, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Normand, Philippe, Pierre, Sylvian.
French (Fugère): variant of Fougère (see Fougere ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Clémence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French and English form of Latin Clementia, a derivative of Clemens ( see Clement ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘mercy’. It was fairly popular in Britain from the late medieval period until the 17th century, but has since been used less often.

en.lifeSummary: When Clémence de Fougères was born in 1170, her father, Guillaume de Fougères, was 21 and her mother, Agatha du Hommet, was 19. She married Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan about 1190. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1252, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clémence de Fougères est née en 1170, son père, Guillaume de Fougères, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agatha du Hommet, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan environ 1190. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1252, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clémence de Fougères 1170 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume de Fougères 21 und ihre Mutter Agatha du Hommet 19. Sie hat um 1190 Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1252 im Alter von 82 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clémence de Fougères è nata il nel 1170, sua padre, Guillaume de Fougères, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Agatha du Hommet, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan circa 1190. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1252, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Clémence de Fougèresが1170年に生まれた時，父Guillaume de Fougèresは21歳，母Agatha du Hommetは19歳であった。約1190年にAlain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1252年に82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Clémence de Fougères(이)가 1170년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Fougères(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha du Hommet(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1190년 Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1252년 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Wallingford, Berkshire, England: Wallingford, Bearrucscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clémence de Fougères nasceu em 1170, seu pai, Guillaume de Fougères, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agatha du Hommet, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan aproximadamente 1190. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1252, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clémence de Fougères родилась в 1170 г., её отцу по имени Guillaume de Fougères было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agatha du Hommet, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan около 1190 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1252 г. в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clémence de Fougères nació en 1170, su papá, Guillaume de Fougères, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Agatha du Hommet, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alain de Vitre, Seigneur de Dinan aproximadamente 1190. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1252, a la edad de 82 años.
